text.message: Anything I can do to convince you to not plow me?
Yeah that was directed at you.  We're good
It's all good.  Red is so far ahead, it's probably hard for us to come back
I stand by what I said.  This is going to be a quick game
guys we all know its red no need to table
have the servers been really bad for anyone else  today or is it just my internet?
ya I was lagging a bit earlier
Green we need you to dev
